title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at EaseMyTrip - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at EaseMyTrip - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
EaseMyTrip invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
